See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 96473 => 'ITPC', 9647400 => 'Itisaluna', 9647401 => 'Itisaluna', 9647435 => 'Kalimat', 9647436 => 'Kalimat', 9647444 => 'Mobitel', 9647480 => 'ITC Fanoos', 9647481 => 'ITC Fanoos', 9647491 => 'ITPC', 9647494 => 'Imam Hussien Holy Shrine', 9647495 => 'IraqTel', 9647496 => 'IraqTel', 96475 => 'Korek', 96476 => 'Omnnea', 96477 => 'Asiacell', 96478 => 'Zain', 96479 => 'Zain', ];
